HCL Technologies Ltd

HCL Technologies Summary Chart Analysis Peers Quarters Profit & Loss Balance Sheet Cash Flow Ratios Investors Documents

HCL Technologies Ltd

₹ 1,139 5.65%
03 Jul - close price
hcltech.com BSE: 532281 NSE: HCLTECH
About

HCL Tech is a leading global IT services company, which is ranked amongst the top five Indian IT services companies in terms of revenues. Since its inception into the global landscape after its IPO in 1999, HCL Tech has focused on transformational outsourcing, and offers an integrated portfolio of services including software-led IT solutions, remote infrastructure management, engineering and R&D services and BPO. The company leverages its extensive global offshore infrastructure and network of offices in 46 countries to provide multi-service delivery in key industry verticals.

Key Points

Business Overview[1]
HCLTech is a global technology company, employs more than 226,300 people across 60 countries, delivering industry-leading capabilities centered around AI, digital, engineering, cloud and software, powered by a broad portfolio of technology services and products. Co. named to Fortune’s World’s Most Admired Companies 2026 List.

Website BSE NSE
  • Market Cap ₹ 3,09,086 Cr.
  • Current Price ₹ 1,139
  • High / Low ₹ 1,780 / 1,030
  • Stock P/E 17.8
  • Book Value ₹ 277
  • Dividend Yield 4.74 %
  • ROCE 30.6 %
  • ROE 24.0 %
  • Face Value ₹ 2.00
Edit ratios

Pros

  • Company is almost debt free.
  • Stock is providing a good dividend yield of 4.74%.
  • Company has been maintaining a healthy dividend payout of 90.6%

Cons

  • The company has delivered a poor sales growth of 11.5% over past five years.

* The pros and cons are machine generated. Pros / cons are based on a checklist to highlight important points. Please exercise caution and do your own analysis.

Classifications such as banks and foreign portfolio investors were not available earlier. The sudden changes in FII or DII can be because of these changes.

Click on the line-items to see the names of individual entities.

Documents

Announcements

All
  • Grant Of Restricted Stock Units ('Rsus')
    2d - Granted 43.27 lakh RSUs to 2,111 employees; 26,621 earlier RSUs cancelled.
  • Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
    2d - HCLTech signed a $1.14 billion AI-driven strategic partnership for global digital workplace and enterprise networks, July 2026-December 2031.
  • Updates - 'Hclsoftware Completes Acquisition Of Jaspersoft, From Cloud Software Group'
    2 Jul - HCLSoftware completed Jaspersoft acquisition from Cloud Software Group on July 2, 2026, effective July 1.
  • Release - 'Hcltech Voiceops AI Wins Product Of The Year At NAB Show 2026'
    30 Jun - HCLTech VoiceOps AI won Product of the Year at NAB Show 2026.
  • Release - 'Hcltech Recognized As 2026 Global Alliances Americas Partner Of The Year By Dell Technologies'
    29 Jun - HCLTech named Dell Technologies’ 2026 Americas Partner of the Year and EMEA Growth Partner of the Year.
